description: Component: ticket description edit mode renders the shared `TextEditor` instead of the prior plain-text field behavior.
Regression: description read mode still renders through `RichTextViewer` when not editing.
Unit: legacy plain-text description input is converted into a single paragraph block for editor initialization.
Unit: valid serialized BlockNote description JSON is parsed into blocks without mutation.
Unit: malformed description JSON falls back safely to paragraph text rather than crashing edit mode.
UI: saving a ticket description sends serialized BlockNote JSON through `onUpdateDescription(content: string)`.
DB-backed integration happy path: updating a ticket description persists the serialized BlockNote JSON string in `tickets.attributes.description` and the value round-trips on refetch.
DB-backed integration guard path: description update is rejected or reported correctly when the caller lacks permission to update the ticket.
Editor integration: pasted markdown in the description editor is converted through the shared markdown-to-blocks path.
Editor integration: pasted HTML in the description editor is normalized through the same shared editor pipeline used for comments.
Contract: description editor wires the ticket clipboard-image upload callback into `TextEditor.uploadFile`.
Integration: pasting one clipboard image into the description editor uploads it as a ticket document and returns a document-backed view URL.
Integration: pasting multiple clipboard images into the description editor preserves upload order and draft tracking identity.
Regression: unsupported MIME types or oversized clipboard files are still rejected through the shared ticket upload validation path.
Render: saved description image blocks resolve to ticket document-backed URLs and display inline after save and reopen.
Regression: existing saved rich descriptions reopen in edit mode without losing formatting, mentions, or image blocks.
Editor integration: description editor enables mention search and insertion using the same ticket mention source as comments.
UI: canceling description edit with draft-uploaded images opens the keep/delete confirmation dialog.
UI: choosing keep on description cancel closes edit mode without deleting uploaded draft images.
API integration happy path: choosing delete on description cancel hard-deletes the targeted draft-uploaded images and refreshes ticket documents.
API integration guard path: description cancel delete refuses to delete artifacts already referenced by saved content or not deletable by the requester.
Unit: the shared ticket rich-text parsing helper returns the default empty block for empty or missing description content.
Unit: the shared ticket rich-text upload/session helper tracks draft-uploaded artifacts only for flows configured to track drafts.
Regression: ticket comment compose flow still prompts keep/delete on cancel after moving onto the shared ticket rich-text helper.
Regression: ticket comment compose save path still clears draft tracking and closes the editor after a successful submit.
Regression: existing comment edit flow still uploads pasted images but does not adopt the new description cancel prompt behavior.
Regression: tickets with no description still open the editor with an empty default block and save/cancel safely.
Flow contract: legacy plain-text description -> edit -> save -> reopen yields rich JSON persistence and correct viewer output.
Flow contract: rich description with pasted image -> cancel keep preserves ticket documents but leaves saved description unchanged.
Flow contract: rich description with pasted image -> cancel delete removes the draft-uploaded documents and leaves saved description unchanged.
Regression suite: comment compose, comment edit, and description edit all route through the shared ticket rich-text helper with their intended draft-tracking modes.
